Skip to contents
DNAtranslate 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Introduction to DNAtranslate

DNAtranslate

This R package was created to experiment with the R creation process and simplify the import of DNA sequenes, translation of DNA sequences and reversal of DNA sequences.

Installation

You can install the development version of Rpackage from GitHub with:

# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("ADC-405-S26/DNAtranslate")

Example

This is a basic example which shows you how import a DNA sequence, reverse it, and then translate it into proteins.

Import DNA sequences 

library(DNAtranslate)
# import a .txt file formatted as followed 
# >Sequence Name
# ATGCATGCATGCATGCATGCATGC
# ATGCATGCATGC...
path <- system.file("extdata", "exampleSequences.txt", package = "DNAtranslate")
sequencesDF <- readSequences(path)
head(sequencesDF)
#>                            name
#> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype
#> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence
#> 1  ATGAGCTTCAATACCCTGATTGACTGGAACAGCTGTAGCCCTGAACAGCAGCGTGCGCTGCTGACGCGTCCGGCGATTTCCGCCTCTGACAGTATTACCCGGACGGTCAGCGATATTCTGGATAATGTAAAAACGCGCGGTGACGATGCCCTGCGTGAATACAGCGCTAAATTTGATAAAACAGAAGTGACAGCGCTACGCGTCACCCCTGAAGAGATCGCCGCCGCCGGCGCGCGTCTGAGCGACGAATTAAAACAGGCGATGACCGCTGCCGTCAAAAATATTGAAACGTTCCATTCCGCGCAGACGCTACCGCCTGTAGATGTGGAAACCCAGCCAGGCGTGCGTTGCCAGCAGGTTACGCGTCCCGTCTCGTCTGTCGGTCTGTATATTCCCGGCGGCTCGGCTCCGCTCTTCTCAACGGTGCTGATGCTGGCGACGCCGGCGCGCATTGCGGGATGCCAGAAGGTGGTTCTGTGCTCGCCGCCGCCCATCGCTGATGAAATCCTCTATGCGGCGCAACTGTGTGGCGTGCAGGAAATCTTTAACGTCGGCGGCGCGCAGGCGATTGCCGCTCTGGCCTTCGGCAGCGAGTCCGTACCGAAAGTGGATAAAATTTTTGGCCCCGGCAACGCCTTTGTAACCGAAGCCAAACGTCAGGTCAGCCAGCGTCTCGACGGCGCGGCTATCGATATGCCAGCCGGGCCGTCTGAAGTACTGGTGATCGCAGACAGCGGCGCAACACCGGATTTCGTCGCTTCTGACCTGCTCTCCCAGGCTGAGCACGGCCCGGATTCCCAGGTGATCCTGCTGACGCCTGATGCTGACATTGCCCGCAAGGTGGCGGAGGCGGTAGAACGTCAACTGGCGGAACTGCCGCGCGCGGACACCGCCGGCAGGCCCTGAGCGCCAGTCGTCTGATTGTGACCAAAGATTTAGCGCAGTGCGTCGCCATCTCTAATCAGTATGGGCCGGAACACTTAATCATCCAGACGCGCAATGCGCGCGATTTGGTGGATGCGATTACCAGCGCAGGCTCGGTATTTCTCGGCGACTGGTCGCCGGAATCCGCCGGTGATTACGCTTCCGGAACCAACCATGTTTTACCGACCTATGGCTATACTGCTACCTGTTCCAGCCTTGGGTTAGCGGATTTCCAGAAACGGATGACCGTTCAGGAACTGTCGAAAGCGGGCTTTTCCGCTCTGGCATCAACCATTGAAACATTGGCGGCGGCAGAACGTCTGACCGCCCATAAAAATGCCGTGACCCTGCGCGTAAACGCCCTCAAGGAGCAAGCATG
#> 2 ATGAGCTTCAATACCCTGATTGACTGGAACAGCTGTAGCCCTGAACAGCAGCGTGCGCTGCTGACGCGTCCGGCGATTTCCGCCTCTGACAGTATTACCCGGACGGTCAGCGATATTCTGGATAATGTAAAAACGCGCGGTGACGATGCCCTGCGTGAATACAGCGCTAAATTTGATAAAACAGAAGTGACAGCGCTACGCGTCACCCCTGAAGAGATCGCCGCCGCCGGCGCGCGTCTGAGCGACGAATTAAAACAGGCGATGACCGCTGCCGTCAAAAATATTGAAACGTTCCATTCCGCGCAGACGCTACCGCCTGTAGATGTGGAAACCCAGCCAGGCGTGCGTTGCCAGCAGGTTACGCGTCCCGTCTCGTCTGTCGGTCTGTATATTCCCGGCGGCTCGGCTCCGCTCTTCTCAACGGTGCTGATGCTGGCGACGCCGGCGCGCATTGCGGGATGCCAGAAGGTGGTTCTGTGCTCGCCGCCGCCCATCGCTGATGAAATCCTCTATGCGGCGCAACTGTGTGGCGTGCAGGAAATCTTTAACGTCGGCGGCGCGCAGGCGATTGCCGCTCTGGCCTTCGGCAGCGAGTCCGTACCGAAAGTGGATAAAATTTTTGGCCCCGGCAACGCCTTTGTAACCGAAGCCAAACGTCAGGTCAGCCAGCGTCTCGACGGCGCGGCTATCGATATGCCAGCCGGGCCGTCTGAAGTACTGGTGATCGCAGACAGCGGCGCAACACCGGATTTCGTCGCTTCTGACCTGCTCTCCCAGGCTGAGCACGGCCCGGATTCCCAGGTGATCCTGCTGACGCCTGATGCTGACATTGCCCGCAAGGTGGCGGAGGCGGTAGAACGTCAACTGGCGGAACTGCCGCGCGCGGACACCGCCCGGCAGGCCCTGAGCGCCAGTCGTCTGATTGTGACCAAAGATTTAGCGCAGTGCGTCGCCATCTCTAATCAGTATGGGCCGGAACACTTAATCATCCAGACGCGCAATGCGCGCGATTTGGTGGATGCGATTACCAGCGCAGGCTCGGTATTTCTCGGCGACTGGTCGCCGGAATCCGCCGGTGATTACGCTTCCGGAACCAACCATGTTTTACCGACCTATGGCTATACTGCTACCTGTTCCAGCCTTGGGTTAGCGGATTTCCAGAAACGGATGACCGTTCAGGAACTGTCGAAAGCGGGCTTTTCCGCTCTGGCATCAACCATTGAAACATTGGCGGCGGCAGAACGTCTGACCGCCCATAAAAATGCCGTGACCCTGCGCGTAAACGCCCTCAAGGAGCAAGCATG

Reverse specific sequence 

library(DNAtranslate)
# take that previously created DF and flip a specified sequence
reverse <- reverseSequence(exampleSequences, "HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype")
head(reverse)
#>                            name
#> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype
#> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence
#> 1  GTACGAACGAGGAACTCCCGCAAATGCGCGTCCCAGTGCCGTAAAAATACCCGCCAGTCTGCAAGACGGCGGCGGTTACAAAGTTACCAACTACGGTCTCGCCTTTTCGGGCGAAAGCTGTCAAGGACTTGCCAGTAGGCAAAGACCTTTAGGCGATTGGGTTCCGACCTTGTCCATCGTCATATCGGTATCCAGCCATTTTGTACCAACCAAGGCCTTCGCATTAGTGGCCGCCTAAGGCCGCTGGTCAGCGGCTCTTTATGGCTCGGACGCGACCATTAGCGTAGGTGGTTTAGCGCGCGTAACGCGCAGACCTACTAATTCACAAGGCCGGGTATGACTAATCTCTACCGCTGCGTGACGCGATTTAGAAACCAGTGTTAGTCTGCTGACCGCGAGTCCCGGACGGCCGCCACAGGCGCGCGCCGTCAAGGCGGTCAACTGCAAGATGGCGGAGGCGGTGGAACGCCCGTTACAGTCGTAGTCCGCAGTCGTCCTAGTGGACCCTTAGGCCCGGCACGAGTCGGACCCTCTCGTCCAGTCTTCGCTGCTTTAGGCCACAACGCGGCGACAGACGCTAGTGGTCATGAAGTCTGCCGGGCCGACCGTATAGCTATCGGCGCGGCAGCTCTGCGACCGACTGGACTGCAAACCGAAGCCAATGTTTCCGCAACGGCCCCGGTTTTTAAAATAGGTGAAAGCCATGCCTGAGCGACGGCTTCCGGTCTCGCCGTTAGCGGACGCGCGGCGGCTGCAATTTCTAAAGGACGTGCGGTGTGTCAACGCGGCGTATCTCCTAAAGTAGTCGCTACCCGCCGCCGCTCGTGTCTTGGTGGAAGACCGTAGGGCGTTACGCGCGGCCGCAGCGGTCGTAGTCGTGGCAACTCTTCTCGCCTCGGCTCGGCGGCCCTTATATGTCTGGCTGTCTGCTCTGCCCTGCGCATTGGACGACCGTTGCGTGCGGACCGACCCAAAGGTGTAGATGTCCGCCATCGCAGACGCGCCTTACCTTGCAAAGTTATAAAAACTGCCGTCGCCAGTAGCGGACAAAATTAAGCAGCGAGTCTGCGCGCGGCCGCCGCCGCTAGAGAAGTCCCCACTGCGCATCGCGACAGTGAAGACAAAATAGTTTAAATCGCGACATAAGTGCGTCCCGTAGCAGTGGCGCGCAAAAATGTAATAGGTCTTATAGCGACTGGCAGGCCCATTATGACAGTCTCCGCCTTTAGCGGCCTGCGCAGTCGTCGCGTGCGACGACAAGTCCCGATGTCGACAAGGTCAGTTAGTCCCATAACTTCGAGTA
#> 2 ATGAGCTTCAATACCCTGATTGACTGGAACAGCTGTAGCCCTGAACAGCAGCGTGCGCTGCTGACGCGTCCGGCGATTTCCGCCTCTGACAGTATTACCCGGACGGTCAGCGATATTCTGGATAATGTAAAAACGCGCGGTGACGATGCCCTGCGTGAATACAGCGCTAAATTTGATAAAACAGAAGTGACAGCGCTACGCGTCACCCCTGAAGAGATCGCCGCCGCCGGCGCGCGTCTGAGCGACGAATTAAAACAGGCGATGACCGCTGCCGTCAAAAATATTGAAACGTTCCATTCCGCGCAGACGCTACCGCCTGTAGATGTGGAAACCCAGCCAGGCGTGCGTTGCCAGCAGGTTACGCGTCCCGTCTCGTCTGTCGGTCTGTATATTCCCGGCGGCTCGGCTCCGCTCTTCTCAACGGTGCTGATGCTGGCGACGCCGGCGCGCATTGCGGGATGCCAGAAGGTGGTTCTGTGCTCGCCGCCGCCCATCGCTGATGAAATCCTCTATGCGGCGCAACTGTGTGGCGTGCAGGAAATCTTTAACGTCGGCGGCGCGCAGGCGATTGCCGCTCTGGCCTTCGGCAGCGAGTCCGTACCGAAAGTGGATAAAATTTTTGGCCCCGGCAACGCCTTTGTAACCGAAGCCAAACGTCAGGTCAGCCAGCGTCTCGACGGCGCGGCTATCGATATGCCAGCCGGGCCGTCTGAAGTACTGGTGATCGCAGACAGCGGCGCAACACCGGATTTCGTCGCTTCTGACCTGCTCTCCCAGGCTGAGCACGGCCCGGATTCCCAGGTGATCCTGCTGACGCCTGATGCTGACATTGCCCGCAAGGTGGCGGAGGCGGTAGAACGTCAACTGGCGGAACTGCCGCGCGCGGACACCGCCCGGCAGGCCCTGAGCGCCAGTCGTCTGATTGTGACCAAAGATTTAGCGCAGTGCGTCGCCATCTCTAATCAGTATGGGCCGGAACACTTAATCATCCAGACGCGCAATGCGCGCGATTTGGTGGATGCGATTACCAGCGCAGGCTCGGTATTTCTCGGCGACTGGTCGCCGGAATCCGCCGGTGATTACGCTTCCGGAACCAACCATGTTTTACCGACCTATGGCTATACTGCTACCTGTTCCAGCCTTGGGTTAGCGGATTTCCAGAAACGGATGACCGTTCAGGAACTGTCGAAAGCGGGCTTTTCCGCTCTGGCATCAACCATTGAAACATTGGCGGCGGCAGAACGTCTGACCGCCCATAAAAATGCCGTGACCCTGCGCGTAAACGCCCTCAAGGAGCAAGCATG
# now the sequence with the name "HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype" is flipped

Generate protein sequence from DNA 

library(DNAtranslate)
# add a new column to the sequence DF with the protein sequence that corresponds with the DNA sequence
proteinSequence <- translateDNA(exampleSequences, offset = 0)
head(proteinSequence)
#>                            name
#> 1   HisD TA1538 Mutant Genotype
#> 2 LT2 (wild-type) HisD Genotype
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   sequence
#> 1  ATGAGCTTCAATACCCTGATTGACTGGAACAGCTGTAGCCCTGAACAGCAGCGTGCGCTGCTGACGCGTCCGGCGATTTCCGCCTCTGACAGTATTACCCGGACGGTCAGCGATATTCTGGATAATGTAAAAACGCGCGGTGACGATGCCCTGCGTGAATACAGCGCTAAATTTGATAAAACAGAAGTGACAGCGCTACGCGTCACCCCTGAAGAGATCGCCGCCGCCGGCGCGCGTCTGAGCGACGAATTAAAACAGGCGATGACCGCTGCCGTCAAAAATATTGAAACGTTCCATTCCGCGCAGACGCTACCGCCTGTAGATGTGGAAACCCAGCCAGGCGTGCGTTGCCAGCAGGTTACGCGTCCCGTCTCGTCTGTCGGTCTGTATATTCCCGGCGGCTCGGCTCCGCTCTTCTCAACGGTGCTGATGCTGGCGACGCCGGCGCGCATTGCGGGATGCCAGAAGGTGGTTCTGTGCTCGCCGCCGCCCATCGCTGATGAAATCCTCTATGCGGCGCAACTGTGTGGCGTGCAGGAAATCTTTAACGTCGGCGGCGCGCAGGCGATTGCCGCTCTGGCCTTCGGCAGCGAGTCCGTACCGAAAGTGGATAAAATTTTTGGCCCCGGCAACGCCTTTGTAACCGAAGCCAAACGTCAGGTCAGCCAGCGTCTCGACGGCGCGGCTATCGATATGCCAGCCGGGCCGTCTGAAGTACTGGTGATCGCAGACAGCGGCGCAACACCGGATTTCGTCGCTTCTGACCTGCTCTCCCAGGCTGAGCACGGCCCGGATTCCCAGGTGATCCTGCTGACGCCTGATGCTGACATTGCCCGCAAGGTGGCGGAGGCGGTAGAACGTCAACTGGCGGAACTGCCGCGCGCGGACACCGCCGGCAGGCCCTGAGCGCCAGTCGTCTGATTGTGACCAAAGATTTAGCGCAGTGCGTCGCCATCTCTAATCAGTATGGGCCGGAACACTTAATCATCCAGACGCGCAATGCGCGCGATTTGGTGGATGCGATTACCAGCGCAGGCTCGGTATTTCTCGGCGACTGGTCGCCGGAATCCGCCGGTGATTACGCTTCCGGAACCAACCATGTTTTACCGACCTATGGCTATACTGCTACCTGTTCCAGCCTTGGGTTAGCGGATTTCCAGAAACGGATGACCGTTCAGGAACTGTCGAAAGCGGGCTTTTCCGCTCTGGCATCAACCATTGAAACATTGGCGGCGGCAGAACGTCTGACCGCCCATAAAAATGCCGTGACCCTGCGCGTAAACGCCCTCAAGGAGCAAGCATG
#> 2 ATGAGCTTCAATACCCTGATTGACTGGAACAGCTGTAGCCCTGAACAGCAGCGTGCGCTGCTGACGCGTCCGGCGATTTCCGCCTCTGACAGTATTACCCGGACGGTCAGCGATATTCTGGATAATGTAAAAACGCGCGGTGACGATGCCCTGCGTGAATACAGCGCTAAATTTGATAAAACAGAAGTGACAGCGCTACGCGTCACCCCTGAAGAGATCGCCGCCGCCGGCGCGCGTCTGAGCGACGAATTAAAACAGGCGATGACCGCTGCCGTCAAAAATATTGAAACGTTCCATTCCGCGCAGACGCTACCGCCTGTAGATGTGGAAACCCAGCCAGGCGTGCGTTGCCAGCAGGTTACGCGTCCCGTCTCGTCTGTCGGTCTGTATATTCCCGGCGGCTCGGCTCCGCTCTTCTCAACGGTGCTGATGCTGGCGACGCCGGCGCGCATTGCGGGATGCCAGAAGGTGGTTCTGTGCTCGCCGCCGCCCATCGCTGATGAAATCCTCTATGCGGCGCAACTGTGTGGCGTGCAGGAAATCTTTAACGTCGGCGGCGCGCAGGCGATTGCCGCTCTGGCCTTCGGCAGCGAGTCCGTACCGAAAGTGGATAAAATTTTTGGCCCCGGCAACGCCTTTGTAACCGAAGCCAAACGTCAGGTCAGCCAGCGTCTCGACGGCGCGGCTATCGATATGCCAGCCGGGCCGTCTGAAGTACTGGTGATCGCAGACAGCGGCGCAACACCGGATTTCGTCGCTTCTGACCTGCTCTCCCAGGCTGAGCACGGCCCGGATTCCCAGGTGATCCTGCTGACGCCTGATGCTGACATTGCCCGCAAGGTGGCGGAGGCGGTAGAACGTCAACTGGCGGAACTGCCGCGCGCGGACACCGCCCGGCAGGCCCTGAGCGCCAGTCGTCTGATTGTGACCAAAGATTTAGCGCAGTGCGTCGCCATCTCTAATCAGTATGGGCCGGAACACTTAATCATCCAGACGCGCAATGCGCGCGATTTGGTGGATGCGATTACCAGCGCAGGCTCGGTATTTCTCGGCGACTGGTCGCCGGAATCCGCCGGTGATTACGCTTCCGGAACCAACCATGTTTTACCGACCTATGGCTATACTGCTACCTGTTCCAGCCTTGGGTTAGCGGATTTCCAGAAACGGATGACCGTTCAGGAACTGTCGAAAGCGGGCTTTTCCGCTCTGGCATCAACCATTGAAACATTGGCGGCGGCAGAACGTCTGACCGCCCATAAAAATGCCGTGACCCTGCGCGTAAACGCCCTCAAGGAGCAAGCATG
#>                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              protein
#> 1 MSFNTLIDWNSCSPEQQRALLTRPAISASDSITRTVSDILDNVKTRGDDALREYSAKFDKTEVTALRVTPEEIAAAGARLSDELKQAMTAAVKNIETFHSAQTLPPVDVETQPGVRCQQVTRPVSSVGLYIPGGSAPLFSTVLMLATPARIAGCQKVVLCSPPPIADEILYAAQLCGVQEIFNVGGAQAIAALAFGSESVPKVDKIFGPGNAFVTEAKRQVSQRLDGAAIDMPAGPSEVLVIADSGATPDFVASDLLSQAEHGPDSQVILLTPDADIARKVAEAVERQLAELPRADTAGRP*APVV*L*PKI*RSASPSLISMGRNT*SSRRAMRAIWWMRLPAQARYFSATGRRNPPVITLPEPTMFYRPMAILLPVPALG*RISRNG*PFRNCRKRAFPLWHQPLKHWRRQNV*PPIKMP*PCA*TPSRSKH
#> 2 MSFNTLIDWNSCSPEQQRALLTRPAISASDSITRTVSDILDNVKTRGDDALREYSAKFDKTEVTALRVTPEEIAAAGARLSDELKQAMTAAVKNIETFHSAQTLPPVDVETQPGVRCQQVTRPVSSVGLYIPGGSAPLFSTVLMLATPARIAGCQKVVLCSPPPIADEILYAAQLCGVQEIFNVGGAQAIAALAFGSESVPKVDKIFGPGNAFVTEAKRQVSQRLDGAAIDMPAGPSEVLVIADSGATPDFVASDLLSQAEHGPDSQVILLTPDADIARKVAEAVERQLAELPRADTARQALSASRLIVTKDLAQCVAISNQYGPEHLIIQTRNARDLVDAITSAGSVFLGDWSPESAGDYASGTNHVLPTYGYTATCSSLGLADFQKRMTVQELSKAGFSALASTIETLAAAERLTAHKNAVTLRVNALKEQA
